productDisplayName: Fastrack Men Economy 2 Analog Steel Black Watch
description: Stylish and comfortable, this analog wrist watch from fastrack& rsquo s Economy 2 Series is designed for those who love their everyday wear accessories.Case diameter: 40 mmCase thickness: 8 mmDial shape: SquareSteel case with a fixed bezel for added durability, style and comfort Plastic strap with a tang clasp for comfort and styleBlack dial with partial minute numbering at every 5-minute unit, with the brand symbol standing between the 11 and 12 o& rsquo clock mark and brand name between 8 and 9 o& rsquo clock mark9 o& rsquo clock mark embossed in number on the bezel, with lines marking the 12, 2, 4, 6, 8 and 10  o& rsquo clock positionsQuartz movement of time display Screw to reset timeSolid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durabilityWater resistant up to 50 meters, which helps you wear it when swimming
